# LaunchHouse Events

> Hands-on Cvent event build support for commercial event teams: registration builds, Attendee Hub configuration, mobile event app readiness, OnArrival check-in preparation, event tech QA, reporting, and ongoing event operations support. Simple builds start at $899.

LaunchHouse Events is a specialist Cvent build and event-technology partner for commercial and lean event teams. The team handles registration form configuration, Attendee Hub setup, mobile app readiness, OnArrival/check-in preparation, reporting, and on-event support — designed to be faster, cheaper, and better than generic agency engagements.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Overview of Cvent build services, pricing tiers, and same-day delivery options.
- [About](/about): Company story, mission, and the team's Cvent experience.
- [Services](/services): Full catalogue of Cvent and event technology services.
- [Pricing](/pricing): Tiered pricing model from Simple to Complex builds.
- [Event Complexity Calculator](/calculator): Interactive 16-question wizard that scores event complexity and returns an indicative starting price.
- [Get a Quote](/get-a-quote): Quote request form for tailored event build engagements.
- [Contact Us](/contact-us): Contact form for general enquiries and scoping conversations.
